# $2^{\circ}$ 多重积分中的变量代换 若 (续1)

【4201】设 $K(x,y)$ 为区域 $R[a \leqslant x \leqslant b, a \leqslant y \leqslant b]$ 内的连续函数，且

$$
K _ {n} (x, y) = \int_ {a} ^ {b} \int_ {a} ^ {b} \dots \int_ {a} ^ {b} K (x, t _ {1}) K (t _ {1}, t _ {2}) \dots K (t _ {n}, y) d t _ {1} d t _ {2} \dots d t _ {n},
$$

证明： $K_{n + m + 1}(x,y) = \int_a^b K_n(x,t)K_m(t,y)\mathrm{d}t.$

证

$$
\begin{array}{l} K _ {n + m + 1} (x, y) \\ = \int_ {a} ^ {b} \int_ {a} ^ {b} \dots \int_ {a} ^ {b} K (x, t _ {1}) K (t _ {1}, t _ {2}) \dots K (t _ {n}, t) K (t, z _ {1}) K (z _ {1}, z _ {2}) \dots K (z _ {m}, y) d t _ {1} d t _ {2} \dots d t _ {n} d t d z _ {1} d z _ {2} \dots d z _ {m} \\ = \int_ {a} ^ {b} \left\{\left[ \int_ {a} ^ {b} \int_ {a} ^ {b} \dots \int_ {a} ^ {b} K (x, t _ {1}) K (t _ {1}, t _ {2}) \dots K (t _ {n}, t) d t _ {1} d t _ {2} \dots d t _ {n} \right] \right. \\ \left. \cdot \left[ \int_ {a} ^ {b} \int_ {a} ^ {b} \dots \int_ {a} ^ {b} K (t, z _ {1}) K (z _ {1}, z _ {2}) \dots K (z _ {m}, y) d z _ {1} d z _ {2} \dots d z _ {m} \right] \right\} d t \\ = \int_ {u} ^ {b} K _ {n} (x, t) K _ {m} (t, y) d t. \\ \end{array}
$$

【4202】设 $f = f(x_{1},x_{2},\dots ,x_{n})$ 为区域 $0\leqslant x_{i}\leqslant x(i = 1,2,\dots ,n)$ 内的连续函数，证明等式：

$$
\int_ {0} ^ {x} \mathrm {d} x _ {1} \int_ {0} ^ {x _ {1}} \mathrm {d} x _ {2} \dots \int_ {0} ^ {x _ {n - 1}} f \mathrm {d} x _ {n} = \int_ {0} ^ {x} \mathrm {d} x _ {n} \int_ {x _ {n}} ^ {x} \mathrm {d} x _ {n - 1} \dots \int_ {x _ {2}} ^ {x} f \mathrm {d} x _ {1} \quad (n \geqslant 2).
$$

证 考虑下面三个有界闭区域：

$$
\Omega = \left\{\left(x _ {1}, x _ {2}, \dots , x _ {n}\right) \mid 0 \leqslant x _ {i} \leqslant x, i = 1, 2, \dots , n \right\},
$$

$$
\Omega_ {1} = \left\{\left(x _ {1}, x _ {2}, \dots , x _ {n}\right) \mid 0 \leqslant x _ {1} \leqslant x, 0 \leqslant x _ {2} \leqslant x _ {1}, \dots , 0 \leqslant x _ {n} \leqslant x _ {n - 1} \right\},
$$

$$
\Omega_ {2} = \left\{\left(x _ {1}, x _ {2}, \dots , x _ {n}\right) \mid 0 \leqslant x _ {n} \leqslant x, x _ {n} \leqslant x _ {n - 1} \leqslant x, \dots , x _ {2} \leqslant x _ {1} \leqslant x \right\}.
$$

由假定 $f(x_{1},\dots ,x_{n})$ 在区域 $\Omega$ 上连续，显然， $\Omega_1\subset \Omega ,\Omega_2\subset \Omega$ ，故 $f(x_{1},\dots ,x_{n})$ 在 $\Omega_{1}$ 与 $\Omega_{2}$ 上连续.根据化 $_{n}$ 重积分为累次积分的公式，我们有

$$
\iint_ {\Omega_ {1}} \dots \int f d x _ {1} \dots d x _ {n} = \int_ {0} ^ {x} d x _ {1} \int_ {0} ^ {x _ {1}} d x _ {2} \dots \int_ {0} ^ {x _ {n - 1}} f d x _ {n}, \tag {1}
$$

$$
\iint_ {\Omega_ {2}} \dots \int f d x _ {1} \dots d x _ {n} = \int_ {0} ^ {x} d x _ {n} \int_ {x _ {n}} ^ {x} d x _ {n - 1} \dots \int_ {x _ {2}} ^ {x} f d x _ {1}. \tag {2}
$$

下证 $\Omega_{1} = \Omega_{2}$ ，事实上，若 $(x_{1},\dots ,x_{n})\in \Omega_{1}$ ，则

$$
0 \leqslant x _ {1} \leqslant x, 0 \leqslant x _ {2} \leqslant x _ {1}, \dots , 0 \leqslant x _ {n} \leqslant x _ {n - 1}, \tag {3}
$$

从而， $0\leqslant x_{n}\leqslant x_{n - 1}\leqslant x_{n - 2}\leqslant \dots \leqslant x_{2}\leqslant x_{1}\leqslant x.$ (4）

于是， $0\leqslant x_{n}\leqslant x,x_{n}\leqslant x_{n - 1}\leqslant x,\dots ,x_{2}\leqslant x_{1}\leqslant x.$ (5）

由此可知 $(x_{1},\dots ,x_{n})\in \Omega_{2}$ .反之，若 $(x_{1},\dots ,x_{n})\in \Omega_{2}$ ，则(5)式成立.从而，（4)式显然成立，由此又知(3)式成立，故 $(x_{1},\dots ,x_{n})\in \Omega_{1}$ ，于是， $\Omega_1 = \Omega_2$ 获证.由此，再根据(1)式与(2)式，即得

$$
\int_ {0} ^ {x} \mathrm {d} x _ {1} \int_ {0} ^ {x _ {1}} \mathrm {d} x _ {2} \dots \int_ {0} ^ {x _ {n - 1}} f \mathrm {d} x _ {n} = \int_ {0} ^ {x} \mathrm {d} x _ {n} \int_ {x _ {n}} ^ {x} \mathrm {d} x _ {n - 1} \dots \int_ {x _ {2}} ^ {x} f \mathrm {d} x _ {1}.
$$

证毕.
